creator: goranrunfeldt@home.se
text:
update of xtux from 20010204 -> 20010314, here is the changes i got from the mailinglist:
Changes:
Added a bio for entities that didn't already have one.
Fixed top level layer bug when map size < screensize (d'oh)
Entities are sorted on the client so they are drawn in the correct order
(based on the y value of the bottom of their image)
Optimised particle_update(), particle_draw(), from/to net functions
Change events around a bit, but they are still a bit limited in what
they can do.
Added a small sewer level between Street and Skyscraper map (where you
go down the man hole).

Fix: patch follows:
